source_jobs.title: Senior Digital Experience Designer (Contractor)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT FIRSTHAND

Firsthand has built the first AI-powered Brand Agent platform, transforming the way marketers and publishers engage consumers through their own AI agents, anywhere online.

While most AI applications in marketing and advertising focus on back-office automation, the Firsthand Brand Agent Platform™ powers front-line consumer engagement. Operating across both owned properties and paid media, Firsthand's Brand Agents make a company’s expertise accessible in real time, adapting to consumers’ interests and guiding them towards the information they need to take action. Central to the platform is Lakebed™, the company’s AI-first data and knowledge rights management system that ensures brands retain full ownership and control of their expertise.

Firsthand is led by Jon Heller, Michael Rubenstein, and Wei Wei, whose previous ventures helped build the foundations of modern digital advertising. Backed by Radical Ventures, FirstMark Capital, Aperiam Ventures, and Crossbeam Venture Partners, Firsthand is shaping the future of AI-driven consumer engagement.

Firsthand is headquartered in NYC, with team members working together in-office three days a week.



The Role:

Firsthand is looking for an outstanding Senior Digital Experience Designer to help us create the next generation of digital experiences by working at the intersection of product design, interaction design, UX/UI, marketing, and AI. You will get to work across GTM teams, building design libraries and frameworks, and assisting with pre- and post-sales efforts.

Responsibilities:

 - Design interactive digital narratives from concept through launch, using design elements to supercharge business goals at all stages of the GTM lifecycle.

 - Develop responsive, animated experiences that feel alive—leveraging transitions, states, scroll effects, and motion to guide user journeys.

 - Build and maintain a reusable design system in Figma and/or other prototyping tools.

 - Collaborate with product, engineering, solutions consulting, sales and marketing teams to deliver compelling, brand-forward digital experiences.

 - Thrive within a dynamic environment with the ability to quickly adapt based on feedback from sales and client teams, while remaining grounded in product functionality.

 - Use motion design and animation (After Effects, Lottie, Rive) to enhance storytelling and engagement.

 - Stay ahead of emerging design trends, tools, and technologies (AI design tools, interactive frameworks, motion prototyping).

Qualifications:

 - 7+ years of digital design experience (agency, brand, or editorial background), with a history of working closely with go-to-market teams on client-facing work.

 - Mastery of digital design tools and web technologies: Figma, Adobe Creative Suite, or equivalent.

 - Strong motion and animation skills—experience with After Effects, Lottie, Rive, or equivalent.

 - A portfolio that demonstrates interactive storytelling—projects where motion, sequencing, and interactivity were central.

 - Experience creating for responsive, accessible, and user-centered digital environments.

 - Strong conceptual thinking and ability to translate brand values into digital experiences. Ability to analyze and optimize experiences for clarity, performance, or conversion.

 - Collaborative spirit with excellent communication and presentation skills.


HOW TO APPLY

If you are ready to embark on an exhilarating journey at the forefront of AI, seize this incredible opportunity and apply here. We eagerly anticipate hearing from you!

Note: Compensation and equity will be market-competitive for well-capitalized, early stage startups and will be discussed during the interview process.

source_jobs.title: Staff Product Manager, AI/ML
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT FIRSTHAND

Firsthand has built the first AI-powered Brand Agent platform, transforming the way marketers and publishers engage consumers through their own AI agents, anywhere online.

While most AI applications in marketing and advertising focus on back-office automation, the Firsthand Brand Agent Platform™ powers front-line consumer engagement. Operating across both owned properties and paid media, Firsthand's Brand Agents make a company’s expertise accessible in real time, adapting to consumers’ interests and guiding them towards the information they need to take action. Central to the platform is Lakebed™, the company’s AI-first data and knowledge rights management system that ensures brands retain full ownership and control of their expertise.

Firsthand is led by Jon Heller, Michael Rubenstein, and Wei Wei, whose previous ventures helped build the foundations of modern digital advertising. Backed by Radical Ventures, FirstMark Capital, Aperiam Ventures, and Crossbeam Venture Partners, Firsthand is shaping the future of AI-driven consumer engagement.

Firsthand is headquartered in NYC, with team members working together in-office three days a week.




THE ROLE

Firsthand is looking for a skilled Staff Product Manager who will be responsible for inventing, designing, and implementing novel solutions for the AI landscape within the Firsthand platform.



RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Conceptualize and design new features within the platform, using a data-informed approach and establishing clear metrics for success

 - Navigate through ambiguity and change to collaboratively drive alignment with cross- functional teammates

 - Work with enterprise customers and internal stakeholders to understand their needs and incorporate those insights into product decisions

 - Communicate product vision, strategy, and roadmap to key stakeholders, including senior leadership, to drive alignment and decision-making

 - Stay informed of industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices to drive continuous improvement and innovation


QUALIFICATIONS

 - BS or MS in computer science, related scientific or technical field, or equivalent
   professional experience

 - 7+ years of experience in product management, preferably with 3+ years of experience building ML and AI solutions at enterprise scale

 - Problem-solver with the ability to create simple and intuitive solutions from complex requirements

 - Passion for learning and invention, as well as for efficient processes and scalable execution

 - Experience with the product development cycle and new product launches

 - Excellent communicator and collaborator, with the ability to effectively share complex technical concepts with both technical and non-technical stakeholders


HOW TO APPLY

If you are ready to embark on an exhilarating journey at the forefront of AI, seize this incredible opportunity and apply here. We eagerly anticipate hearing from you!

Note: Compensation and equity will be market-competitive for well-capitalized, early stage startups and will be discussed during the interview process.

source_jobs.title: Solutions Consultant
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT FIRSTHAND

Firsthand has built the first AI-powered Brand Agent platform, transforming the way marketers and publishers engage consumers through their own AI agents, anywhere online.

While most AI applications in marketing and advertising focus on back-office automation, the Firsthand Brand Agent Platform™ powers front-line consumer engagement. Operating across both owned properties and paid media, Firsthand's Brand Agents make a company’s expertise accessible in real time, adapting to consumers’ interests and guiding them towards the information they need to take action. Central to the platform is Lakebed™, the company’s AI-first data and knowledge rights management system that ensures brands retain full ownership and control of their expertise.

Firsthand is led by Jon Heller, Michael Rubenstein, and Wei Wei, whose previous ventures helped build the foundations of modern digital advertising. Backed by Radical Ventures, FirstMark Capital, Aperiam Ventures, and Crossbeam Venture Partners, Firsthand is shaping the future of AI-driven consumer engagement.

Firsthand is headquartered in NYC, with team members working together in-office three days a week.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We are seeking Solutions Consultants to join our fast-growing team. As part of our team, you’ll be at the forefront of transforming how our clients engage their users through AI. You’ll partner closely with enterprise clients—advertisers and publishers—to design, implement, and optimize intelligent AI agent experiences. This is a cross-functional role that blends business acumen, technical fluency, top notch client service, and creativity. You'll help bridge client goals with Firsthand's evolving AI platform and play a key role in scaling new use cases, surfacing insights, and defining best practices.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

Client Integration & Enablement

 - Guide new clients through onboarding, including solution design and tech implementation.

 - Collaborate with clients to understand goals and align our solutions to their business needs.

 - Manage the end-to-end build of Firsthand agents—from content ingestion to front-end deployment into live Brand Agent campaigns.

AI Experimentation & Strategic Consulting

 - Design and run AI experiments that demonstrate agent effectiveness and drive client value.

 - Analyze engagement data and user interactions to generate actionable insights.

 - Provide strategic recommendations to optimize agent design, content inputs, and user flows.

 - Analyze performance of campaigns and generate compelling data analyses and case studies

 - Work with Solutions leadership to extend our Agent Platform into new digital surfaces and new deployment patterns

Internal Collaboration & Product Feedback

 - Collaborate with Engineering and Product to troubleshoot issues and test improvements.

 - Act as a voice of the customer to influence our product roadmap on behalf of clients.

 - Create and maintain documentation, playbooks, and enablement materials to support team growth.

PreSales & Sales Support

 - Partner with the commercial teams to craft compelling demos and technical narratives.

 - Represent Firsthand in technical conversations during the sales cycle.


WHO YOU ARE

 - You’ve worked for 5+ years in ad tech, martech, or a SaaS startup and love the pace and ambiguity of a growing company.

 - You’re excited about AI and its applications in marketing, media, and user experience.

 - You can toggle between technical details and strategic narratives with ease.

 - You enjoy working with both internal teams and external clients, and can build trust quickly.

 - You’re comfortable making slide decks, manipulating spreadsheets, working with data dashboards, and gleaning insights from complex datasets

 - Bonus points for experience with SQL and troubleshooting network traffic


WHY JOIN US

 - You’ll join a small, agile team working on some of the most exciting use cases in AI and marketing.

 - You’ll help shape how leadi
